stories.title: Gary Woodland Wins Houston Open — Course Record, Masters Berth
stories.angle: Emotional comeback win; career resurrection; Masters invitation

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
Gary Woodland just WON the Houston Open.

21-under. New course record. First tour win since brain surgery.

A week after revealing his PTSD battle, he earns a Masters invitation.

One of the best comeback stories in golf. #GolfFanrecap #PGATour

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
Woodland by FIVE shots. 21-under 259. New Memorial Park record.

First PGA Tour win since 2019. First since brain tumor surgery.

And now he's going to Augusta.

This one means more than a tournament win. #GolfFanrecap #HoustonOpen

article.headline: Gary Woodland Wins Houston Open — First Victory Since Brain Surgery, Masters Berth Earned

image_concepts.label: Image 1A
image_concepts.composition: Woodland celebrating or fist pump. Text overlay: "WOODLAND WINS" in primary green (or white on dark) Bebas Neue large. Below: "21-UNDER · COURSE RECORD" in gold. Subtext: "FIRST WIN SINCE BRAIN SURGERY — MASTERS BOUND" in white Montserrat.

image_concepts.label: Image 1B
image_concepts.composition: Woodland on course. Dark overlay. "SEE YOU AT AUGUSTA" in gold Bebas Neue large. Below: "HOUSTON OPEN CHAMPION — 5 SHOTS CLEAR" in white. Subtext: "HIS FIRST WIN SINCE 2019" in light text.

stories.title: Tiger Woods DUI Update — Legal Charges Filed, Masters Status in Doubt
stories.angle: New developments — mugshot, legal charges, Trump comment, Masters timeline

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
Tiger Woods mugshot released. Charges filed: DUI, property damage, refusing a urine test.

Trump on Fox News: "He will be there, but he won't be playing."

Masters status: very uncertain.

The most complicated story in golf right now. #GolfFanrecap #TigerWoods

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
Tiger is still scheduled to appear at Augusta on April 5 for The Patch project.

He is legally allowed to play the Masters.

But physically? Legally? Emotionally?

There are a lot of questions and not many answers. #GolfFanrecap #Masters2026

article.headline: Tiger Woods DUI Charges Filed — Mugshot Released, Masters Status Increasingly Uncertain

image_concepts.label: Image 2A
image_concepts.composition: Tiger in golf action shot (NOT mugshot — use golf imagery). Dark overlay with slight red tint. "TIGER UPDATE" in gold Bebas Neue at top. Below: "MUGSHOT RELEASED · CHARGES FILED" in white. Subtext: "MASTERS STATUS UNCERTAIN" in white Montserrat small.

image_concepts.label: Image 2B
image_concepts.composition: Augusta aerial/green. Dark overlay. Text: "TIGER & THE MASTERS" in gold Bebas Neue. Below: "WILL HE PLAY APRIL 9?" in white large. Subtext: "DUI CHARGES · PHYSICAL UNCERTAINTY" in light text.

stories.title: Hyo Joo Kim Back-to-Back LPGA Wins — Ford Championship
stories.angle: Historic back-to-back LPGA wins; historic scoring achievement

x_posts.label: Post 3-1
x_posts.text:
HYO JOO KIM wins the Ford Championship.

BACK-TO-BACK LPGA titles. 28-under 260. Beats Korda by 2.

She also shot two rounds of 61 in the same tournament — first in LPGA HISTORY.

She is absolutely on FIRE. #GolfFanrecap #LPGA

x_posts.label: Post 3-2
x_posts.text:
Nelly Korda: runner-up for the second straight week.

Lydia Ko: opened with a 60, finished T4.

Hyo Joo Kim: won BOTH events.

The LPGA has a new dominant force and her name is Hyo Joo Kim. #GolfFanrecap #LPGATour

article.headline: Hyo Joo Kim Claims Back-to-Back LPGA Titles at Ford Championship — Makes History in the Process

image_concepts.label: Image 3A
image_concepts.composition: Kim celebrating or trophy moment. "BACK-TO-BACK" in gold Bebas Neue massive. Below: "HYO JOO KIM — FORD CHAMPIONSHIP" in white. Subtext: "FIRST IN LPGA HISTORY — TWO 61-ROUNDS IN ONE TOURNAMENT" in light Montserrat small.

image_concepts.label: Image 3B
image_concepts.composition: Kim on course. Stat block: "28-UNDER · 2 SHOTS OVER KORDA" in white. Title: "HYO JOO KIM" in gold Bebas Neue. Subtext: "FOUNDERS CUP + FORD CHAMPIONSHIP" in white Montserrat.

stories.title: Masters 10 Days Out — Field Now Set
stories.angle: Field now finalized; Woodland's exemption; Tiger's shadow over Augusta

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
The Masters is 10 DAYS AWAY.

Field is set. Woodland is in after Sunday's win.

Scheffler (+480). McIlroy defending (+1000).

Tiger? Unclear. The biggest major of the year just got even more dramatic. #GolfFanrecap #Masters2026

article.headline: Masters 2026 Field Set — 10 Days to Augusta, Scheffler the Favorite, Tiger's Shadow Looms Large

image_concepts.label: Image 4A
image_concepts.composition: Augusta National green/azalea background. Dark overlay. "10 DAYS TO AUGUSTA" in gold Bebas Neue large. Below: "SCHEFFLER +480 · McILROY DEFENDING" in white. Subtext: "APRIL 9–12, 2026" in light text.

stories.title: Valero Texas Open Preview — Last Event Before Masters
stories.angle: Last PGA event before Augusta; 22 Masters invitees in field; Fowler/Zalatoris chasing spots

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
The Valero Texas Open starts Thursday — last event before the Masters.

22 Masters invitees are playing at TPC San Antonio.

Fleetwood leads odds. Fowler and Zalatoris fighting for Masters spots.

The Augusta countdown is on. #GolfFanrecap #PGATour

article.headline: Valero Texas Open Preview — The Last Stop Before Augusta, With Augusta Spots Still on the Line

image_concepts.label: Image 5A
image_concepts.composition: Golf course aerial. "VALERO TEXAS OPEN" in gold Bebas Neue. Below: "APR 2-5 · LAST STOP BEFORE MASTERS" in white. Subtext: "22 MASTERS INVITEES IN THE FIELD" in light text.

stories.title: Lydia Ko Finishes 4th After Historic Opening 60
stories.angle: Fade from record-setting opening round; still a memorable week

x_posts.label: Post 6
x_posts.text:
Lydia Ko opened the Ford Championship with a 60.

Closed Sunday with a 68. Fell to 4th.

It wasn't the finish she wanted — but a career-best opening round and a top-5 finish is a great week.

Ko has her eyes on Las Vegas next. #GolfFanrecap #LPGA

image_concepts.label: Image 6A
image_concepts.composition: Ko on course. Text: "OPENED WITH 60" in gold. Below: "LYDIA KO — FORD CHAMPIONSHIP T4" in white. Subtext: "CAREER-BEST OPENING ROUND · EYES NEXT WEEK" in light small text.

stories.title: Masters Grand Slam Chasers — Schauffele, Morikawa, Koepka
stories.angle: Career Grand Slam within reach; historical rarity; DeChambeau also in contention

x_posts.label: Post 7
x_posts.text:
THREE players can complete the Career Grand Slam at Augusta in 10 days:

Schauffele. Morikawa. Koepka.

Each needs only the Masters.

DeChambeau (back-to-back LIV wins) is also in the mix at +1200.

The most loaded Masters in years. #GolfFanrecap #Masters2026

image_concepts.label: Image 7A
image_concepts.composition: Augusta aerial. Dark overlay. "THREE PLAYERS. ONE GRAND SLAM." in gold Bebas Neue large. Below: "SCHAUFFELE · MORIKAWA · KOEPKA" in white. Subtext: "ALL NEED ONLY THE MASTERS" in light Montserrat.
